namespace Threadlink.Shared
{
    public static partial class ThreadlinkIDs
    {
        public static class Nexus
        {
            /// <summary>
            /// AUTO-GENERATED BY THREADLINK'S CODEGEN. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
            /// <para></para>
            /// ID Markers of the player spawn points used in Nexus.
            /// <para></para>
            /// ATTENTION: Do NOT change the order of your spawn point entries in any way after generating them!
            /// This is crucial to avoid configuration corruption in spawn point resolvers during production.
            /// If you no longer want to use a generated spawn point, remove all references to it and rename it
            /// (to something like "Unused_SpawnPoint_X") in the user template file, then re-generate this enum.
            /// </summary>
            public enum SpawnPoints : int
            {
                #region Native Spawn Points:
                None = -1,
                #endregion

                #region User Spawn Points:
                {User-Defined Spawn Point IDs}
                #endregion
            }
        }
    }
}
